name: Egg Cooked with Meat and Fried (Nargisi Kofta
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the water and add the meat, onions, ginger, garlic, salt, and pepper. Pressure cook for 10 minutes at high pressure (15 psi) or until tender over low heat (25 minutes). Reduce pressure and dry half the liquid. Add besan (or 1/2 cup soaked lentils) and cook for 10 minutes. Knead or grind slightly sticky, mix egg yolk, Garam Masala, and yogurt, and knead well.
2. Coat hard boiled eggs with the mixture and deep fry until golden brown.
3. Heat ghee, fry onions to a golden brown color, add garlic, ginger, tomatoes, and yogurt, and cook well until the masala forms a paste. Add water if necessary. Add chopped green onion stems and 1 1/2 cups of water, and cook covered for 10 minutes.
4. When the curry is ready, pour into a serving dish. Cut the koftas in half and arrange over the curry. Cover and bake at 250°F (120°C) for 15-20 minutes.
5. Serve garnished with coriander leaves and Garam Masala.
